How The Cardinal Health (CAH) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Targets And Fair Value (Simply Wall St.) — Cardinal Health’s fair value estimate was nudged from US$249.60 to about US$248.27 per share, signalling a small recalibration rather than a wholesale rethink.

GEHC Moves Manganese-Based MRI Contrast Agent Into Phase 2/3 Trial (Zacks) — GE HealthCare doses first patient in Phase 2/3 LUMINA trial for mangaciclanol, a manganese MRI contrast agent with FDA Fast Track status.
